meta.note: Snapshot of 8 representative entries from verified-visas.json. See full output file in this directory.

India -> Japan.notes: Indian nationals can apply for Japan e-visa (single-entry) for tourist visits up to 90 days, available through VFS Global visa application centers since April 2024.
India -> Japan.validation_notes: haiku said ev, sonnet said vr

India -> United States.notes: B-2 tourist visa required; apply at US Embassy or Consulate in India.

India -> Thailand.notes: Indian passport holders receive 60-day visa-free entry for tourism and short-term business; extendable for 30 days in-country.

United Kingdom -> France.notes: UK passport holders can travel visa-free to France for up to 90 days in any 180-day period.

Australia -> Indonesia.notes: Electronic Visitor Visa (e-VoA) single-entry; 30-day stay permitted; costs IDR 500,000.

Japan -> United Kingdom.notes: Japanese passport holders require an Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) costing £20 for tourist visits up to 6 months.

Germany -> Canada.notes: German citizens require an eTA (electronic travel authorization) to enter Canada by air; normally permits stays up to 6 months.
